name: detectors: exhaustive-deps.sh uses E-15 ESLint-wrap pattern (delegates to eslint-plugin-react-hooks/exhaustive-deps; auto-installs npm package on first use)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/exhaustive-deps.sh" --print-config 2>out.json && grep -E "eslint_rule.*react-hooks/exhaustive-deps" out.json 1>&2 && grep -E "eslint_plugin_npm.*eslint-plugin-react-hooks" out.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
